# Question Types

## Diagnostic pre-check

- Purpose: establish baseline and placement.
- Format: 8 to 12 questions mixed concept and decision trade-offs.

## Formative module checks

- 5 to 10 questions mapped to module objectives.
- Include one scenario-based short answer.

## Practical checks

- Task-based with observable acceptance criteria.
- Include failure modes and troubleshooting prompts.

## Recap prompts

- Learner self-explanation prompts.
- One transfer question to a new context.

## Final assessment

- Integrated implementation scenario.
- Must evaluate architecture, security, operations, cost, troubleshooting.
